# IR64 Global Rice Exporter
# Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India
# APEDA Registered | SGS Certified | Export Since 2007

## About
IR64 is an India-based exporter of non-basmati rice, operating from Chennai, Tamil Nadu.
We export IR64 Rice, Broken Rice, Long Grain Rice, Sona Masoori, Pooni Rice, and Idly Rice
to Africa, the Middle East, and Southeast Asia.

## Products (15 SKUs)
- IR64 Raw Rice 5% Broken        (SKU: IR64-RAW-05)
- IR64 Raw Rice 25% Broken       (SKU: IR64-RAW-25)
- IR64 Parboiled Rice 5% Broken  (SKU: IR64-PB-05)
- IR64 Double Parboiled 5%       (SKU: IR64-DPB-05)
- IR64 Broken Rice D2            (SKU: IR64-D2)
- 100% Broken Rice               (SKU: BRK-100)
- Long Grain White Rice          (SKU: LG-WHITE)
- Long Grain Sella Rice          (SKU: LG-SELLA)
- Long Grain Golden Sella Rice   (SKU: LG-GSELLA)
- Sona Masoori Steam Rice        (SKU: SM-STEAM)
- Sona Masoori Parboiled Rice    (SKU: SM-PB)
- Pooni Raw Rice                 (SKU: PN-RAW)
- Pooni Steam Rice               (SKU: PN-STEAM)
- Pooni Parboiled Rice           (SKU: PN-PB)
- Idly Rice                      (SKU: IDLY-001)

## Certifications
- APEDA (Agricultural & Processed Food Products Export Development Authority)
- IEC (Import Export Code, DGFT India)
- FSSAI (Food Safety and Standards Authority of India)
- SGS (Pre-shipment quality inspection)
- ISO 9001:2015

## Export Markets
Nigeria, Ghana, Benin, Senegal, Morocco, Kenya,
United Arab Emirates, Saudi Arabia, Bangladesh, Philippines, Malaysia

## Incoterms
FOB Chennai, CFR Destination, CIF Destination

## Minimum Order
25 Metric Tonnes (approximately one 20-foot container)

## Machine-Readable Endpoints
Products:        https://ir64.com/api/geo/products
Company:         https://ir64.com/api/geo/company
FAQs:            https://ir64.com/api/geo/faqs
Countries:       https://ir64.com/api/geo/countries
Certifications:  https://ir64.com/api/geo/certifications

https://ir64.com/knowledge-base
